title: Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Bio-Chemistry
content: Galgotias University doctoral program in Biochemistry require students to develop research-based aptitude leading to study on living organisms on a molecular level and involves a deep study of biomolecules. This advanced degree incorporates various fields of biological sciences such as genetics, forensics, molecular biology, food sciences, medicine, plant science and microbiology. The program emphasis is also laid on to encourage students to participate in several seminars, project works, and research in scientific laboratories, analyze the results, and publish the findings in academic journals.
